mapper.insert:
insert into his_inpatient_charge_mirror ( id, tenant_id, fetch_batch_id, his_inpatient_charge_id, patient_id, patient_name, inpatient_no, dept_code, dept_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, charge_item_id, item_name, spec_model, batch_no, expire_date, use_date, charge_date, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, charge_operator, remark, row_fingerprint, process_status, create_by, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.fetchBatchId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeId}, #{e.patientId}, #{e.patientName}, #{e.inpatientNo}, #{e.deptCode}, #{e.deptName}, #{e.doctorId}, #{e.doctorName}, #{e.chargeItemId}, #{e.itemName}, #{e.specModel}, #{e.batchNo}, #{e.expireDate}, #{e.useDate}, #{e.chargeDate}, #{e.quantity}, #{e.unitPrice}, #{e.totalAmount}, #{e.chargeOperator}, #{e.remark}, #{e.rowFingerprint}, #{e.processStatus}, #{e.createBy}, #{e.createTime})
mapper.select: select * from his_inpatient_charge_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and patient_name like concat('%', #{patientName}, '%') and inpatient_no like concat('%', #{inpatientNo}, '%') and dept_name like concat('%', #{deptName}, '%') and charge_item_id = #{chargeItemId} and left(replace(ifnull(charge_date,''),'/','-'),10) >= date_format(#{beginChargeDate},'%Y-%m-%d') and left(replace(ifnull(charge_date,''),'/','-'),10) <= date_format(#{endChargeDate},'%Y-%m-%d') order by charge_date desc, id desc
select * from his_inpatient_charge_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and fetch_batch_id = #{fetchBatchId} and process_status = 'PENDING_CONSUME' order by charge_date, id
select * from his_inpatient_charge_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} limit 1
